Hematology

MCH [Entitic mass] by Automated count28.427 - 33pg
MCHC [Entitic Mass/volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count34.832 - 36g/dL
Erythrocyte distribution width [Entitic volume] by Automated count44.236 - 48fL
Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count167.7150 - 45010*3/uL
Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count178.2 H9.4 - 12.3fL
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count12.1 H7.2 - 11.6fL

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All hematological parameters are within normal limits except for mildly elevated mean platelet volume (MPV) and platelet distribution width (PDW), which may indicate increased platelet turnover or activation. Platelet count is at the lower end of normal. No evidence of anemia, leukocytosis, or other cytopenias. Correlate with clinical context; consider repeating if clinically indicated or if there are bleeding or thrombotic symptoms.
Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
